config.script:
import time
    
    self.props.enabled = False
    
    idx = self.view.params.motorName
    
    read_tag_path = "[MQTT Engine]Zenoh_router_tags/crane/{}/power".format(idx)
    write_tag_path = "[MQTT Engine]Zenoh_router_tags/SCADA/crane/{}/power".format(idx)
    
    read_value = system.tag.readBlocking([read_tag_path])[0].value
    sent_value = system.tag.readBlocking([write_tag_path])[0].value
    
    int_read_value = int(read_value)
    int_sent_value = int(sent_value)
    
    def send_delayed_command():

        time.sleep(0.5) 
        
        final_value = int(not int_read_value)
        system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [final_value])
        self.props.enabled = True

    if int_sent_value == (not int_read_value):
    	
        system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [read_value])
        
    system.util.invokeAsynchronous(send_delayed_command)

motor = self.view.params.motorName
	write_tag_path = "[MQTT Engine]Zenoh_router_tags/SCADA/crane/{}/specified/distance".format(motor)
	read_tag_path = "[MQTT Engine]Zenoh_router_tags/crane/{}/actual_position".format(motor)
	
	pos = float(system.tag.readBlocking([read_tag_path])[0].value)
	
	dist = self.props.value
	
	final_pos = pos + dist
	
	right_limit = 0 
	left_limit = 0
    
	if motor == "motor_horizontal":
		right_limit = -50
		left_limit = -3900
	elif motor == "motor_vertical":
		right_limit = -30
		left_limit = -5800
		
	  
	
	if final_pos > right_limit:
		final_pos = right_limit
		
	if final_pos < left_limit:
		final_pos = left_limit
		
		
	new_value = int(final_pos - pos)
	self.props.value = new_value
	
	system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [new_value])

import time
    
    self.props.enabled = False
    
    idx = self.view.params.motorName
    
    read_tag_path = "[MQTT Engine]Zenoh_router_tags/crane/{}/continuous".format(idx)
    write_tag_path = "[MQTT Engine]Zenoh_router_tags/SCADA/crane/{}/continuous".format(idx)
    
    read_value = system.tag.readBlocking([read_tag_path])[0].value
    sent_value = system.tag.readBlocking([write_tag_path])[0].value
    
    int_read_value = int(read_value)
    int_sent_value = int(sent_value)
    
    def send_delayed_command():

        time.sleep(0.5) 
        
        system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [final_value])
        self.props.enabled = True

    if int_read_value == 1:
    	final_value = 0
    	if int_sent_value == 0:
        	system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [read_value])
        	
    else:
    	final_value = 1
    	if int_sent_value == 1:
        	system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [read_value])
        	
        
    system.util.invokeAsynchronous(send_delayed_command)

import time
    
    self.props.enabled = False
    
    idx = self.view.params.motorName
    
    read_tag_path = "[MQTT Engine]Zenoh_router_tags/crane/{}/continuous".format(idx)
    write_tag_path = "[MQTT Engine]Zenoh_router_tags/SCADA/crane/{}/continuous".format(idx)
    
    read_value = system.tag.readBlocking([read_tag_path])[0].value
    sent_value = system.tag.readBlocking([write_tag_path])[0].value
    
    int_read_value = int(read_value)
    int_sent_value = int(sent_value)
    
    def send_delayed_command():

        time.sleep(0.5) 
        
        system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [final_value])
        self.props.enabled = True

    if int_read_value == 2:
    	final_value = 0
    	if int_sent_value == 0:
        	system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [read_value])
        	
    else:
    	final_value = 2
    	if int_sent_value == 2:
        	system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [read_value])

        
    system.util.invokeAsynchronous(send_delayed_command)
